title: How can I include items within timeframe in the "My Week" view?
excerpt:
The “My Week” view only shows items whose deadline is this week, but it doesn’t include items who have a timeline that contains this week (even when All Dates is selected). 
For example, if today is Tuesday, and I have a…

posts.author: BenDavis (Ben Davis)
posts.cookedHtml:
The “My Week” view only shows items whose deadline is this week, but it doesn’t include items who have a timeline that contains this week (even when All Dates is selected).

For example, if today is Tuesday, and I have a task that began yesterday and ends one week from yesterday (next Monday), it won’t show up on “My Week”.

I would like to have these items show because these are things I should still be working on, even though the deadline is next week.

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed.

See previous discussion on this topic

Show Timeline tasks in My Week Feature requests
Currently in My Week tasks only appear on the last day that is set in a timeline task. It would be very helpful if a task is visible on My Week from the timeline start date up to and including the timeline end date. The most simple example is the use of the vacations board, a three week vacation for a colleague only shows up on My Week on the last week. The current setup means that tasks that need to be done in a certain period now only show up on the due date, not the start date.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
